theme_rankings.why_now: HBM4·CoWoS·EUV 모두 캐파 부족 지속. 2027까지 수요 가시성 확보된 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 정점 논쟁 + 중국 수출 규제 변동성. 어닝 미스 시 30% 낙폭 흔함.

theme_rankings.why_now: MSFT·GOOG·META·AMZN 2026 Capex 합계 $400B+. AI 매출 회수 본격화 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 광고·소비 둔화 시 Capex 가이던스 컷 가능. 빅테크 동반 변동성.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🚂 AI의 '밴더빌트' — 실제 업무에 AI 박는 운영자
theme_rankings.why_now: 추론 비용 90% 하락 + 엔터프라이즈 도입 본격. 진짜 텐베거 후보가 여기서 다수.
theme_rankings.risk: 밸류에이션 과열. 매출 성장 30%+ 못 보이면 멀티플 압축.

theme_rankings.why_now: AI가 돌아가려면 전기 필요. 미국 변압기 대기 100주+ → 만드는 회사들 5년치 일감 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 후반 진입 우려는 아직 작지만, 금리 급등 시 인프라주 동반 조정.

theme_rankings.why_now: 인지노동 다음은 물리노동. 2027~2030 진정한 텐베거 가능 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 상용화 시점 불확실. 미래 옵션밸류 비중 큼. 변동성 극심.

top_news.title: Winning the Degenerate Economy: Masters in Business with Howard Lindzon
top_news.summary: Barry speaks with Howard Lindzon, co-founder and CEO of StockTwits, and founder and managing partner at Social Leverage. They discuss his outlook for venture capital investing including what he sees as potentially profitable from human behavior. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: BlackRock Readies Launch of Two Tokenized Money-Market Funds
top_news.summary: BlackRock Inc. is planning to launch two money-market funds built for investors who hold their cash in stablecoins, not bank accounts, a sign the world’s largest asset manager sees a durable customer base in the digital-dollar economy.

top_news.title: Fed Sees Private Credit Redemptions as ‘Manageable’ Risks
top_news.summary: The Federal Reserve said stability risks from further private credit redemption requests appear “limited and manageable,” after some of the biggest names in the market blocked investors from getting money out of their funds in recent months.

top_news.title: Shaquille O'Neal on Partnership with Authentic Brands
top_news.summary: NBA Hall of Famer Shaquille O'Neal & Authentic Brands CEO Jamie Salter discuss the launch of 'Dunkman,' a new dunk league aiming to compete with the NBA dunk contest. They talk with Romaine Bostick at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills, California. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: S&P Closes Out 6th Straight Week of Gains | Closing Bell
top_news.summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Scarlet Fu, Isabelle Lee, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Enhanced Games Owner Jumps 21% After Going Public Via SPAC
top_news.summary: Enhanced Group Inc. shares climbed almost 21% after going public via a merger with blank-check company A Paradise Acquisition Corp.

top_news.title: Fannie, Freddie’s Latest Bull Says Traders Underpricing IPO Odds
top_news.summary: Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac investors are underestimating the chances of a public market re-entry from the mortgage giants after a lull in chatter around the names, according to Mizuho’s Dan Dolev.

top_news.title: US Stocks Set Record High as Chip Stocks Roar, Payrolls Beat
top_news.summary: US stocks closed at a record high for the third time this week, buoyed by semiconductor stocks, solid employment data and a US-Iran ceasefire that appeared intact even with clashes near the Strait of Hormuz.

top_news.title: Precision Neuroscience CEO on Medtronic Partnership, What's Next
top_news.summary: Precision Neuroscience Co-Founder & CEO Michael Mager discusses the development of a new neurological implant designed to create a communication link with the brain and external computers, as well as the company's partnership with Medtronic. He talks with Romaine Bostick at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills, California. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Stocks Hit Record High on Jobs as Chipmakers Surge
top_news.summary:
Signs of labor-market strength drove stocks to all-time highs, bolstering speculation that the world’s largest economy remains resilient in the face of an energy shock triggered by the Iran war.
Bets that solid growth will keep powering earnings sent the S&P 500 to its sixth straight weekly advance.
